name: hermes-discord-bot
description: Discord bot powered by Hermes Agent — French-language assistant

scripts.pm2:start: npx dotenvx run -f .env -- npx pm2 start hermes-discord-bot-clean.js --name hermes-discord-bot
scripts.pm2:restart: npx pm2 stop hermes-discord-bot 2>/dev/null || true; npx pm2 delete hermes-discord-bot 2>/dev/null || true; npx dotenvx run -f .env -- npx pm2 start hermes-discord-bot-clean.js --name hermes-discord-bot
